LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetFashion.description: A cataphract helmet, which was secretly modified by a fashionable person, was painted with the logo of a famous ancient clothing store.
LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetFashion.label: cataphract helmet “Fashion”
LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetSlaughter.description: A cataphract helmet, which was secretly modified by a deranged killer, was adorned with a skull and the word 'Slaughter'.
LanguageData.AM_CataphractHelmetSlaughter.label: cataphract helmet “Slaughter”
LanguageData.AM_ClosedOxygenCylinder.description: The sealed oxygen cylinder, designed for combat in severe environments, contains a minor amount of doping gas, enhancing the user's combat effectiveness.
LanguageData.AM_ClosedOxygenCylinder.label: closed oxygen cylinder
LanguageData.AM_CompFlakSuit.description: Combat clothing made of aramid material, when paired with a composite bulletproof vest, offers the benefits of lightweight mobility and significant protection. This type of attire was frequently worn by ancient soldiers.
LanguageData.AM_CompFlakSuit.label: composite flak suit
LanguageData.AM_FullyEnclosedHelmet.description: An aramid bulletproof helmet, paired with a fully enclosed polyurethane gas mask, effectively mitigates the dangers of toxic environments and offers superior protection,often equipped by ancient soldiers.
LanguageData.AM_FullyEnclosedHelmet.label: fully enclosed helmet
LanguageData.AM_NightVisionHelmet.description: An aramid bulletproof helmet, used in conjunction with night vision goggles, enhances the wearer's shooting accuracy. It was commonly worn by ancient soldiers.
LanguageData.AM_NightVisionHelmet.label: night vision helmet
